title: NALCO Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 268 Technician, Operator and More Posts
organization: National Aluminium Company Limited (NALCO) - A Navratna Government of India Enterprise
department: Mines & Refinery (M&R) Complex, Damanjodi, Koraput District, Odisha
post_name: Operator (HEMM) Gr. III, Mining Mate Gr. III, Jr. Foreman (Mines), Jr. Foreman (Electrical), SUPT(JOT)-Operator, Operator Gr. III, SUPT(JOT)-Fitter, Technician (Fitter) Gr. III, SUPT(JOT)-Electrical, Technician (Electrical) Gr. III, SUPT(JOT)-Laboratory, SUPT(JOT)-Instrumentation/Instrument Mechanic, Technician (Instrumentation/Instrument Mechanic) Gr. III
short_info: National Aluminium Company Limited (NALCO) Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website nalcoindia.com. A total of 272 vacancies have been announced through the NALCO Non-Executive Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.cbt / trade test date: To be notified on NALCO website and through email/SMS

application_fee.details: Application fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. Fee can be paid through dedicated bank account, net banking, debit card, or UPI only. Fee shall not be collected by any other mode. Candidates are advised to verify their eligibility before paying the fee. SC, ST, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen, Land Ousted candidates, and internal candidates are exempted from payment of application fee.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on the last date of online application submission (10-06-2026). Upper age limit is relaxable for various categories. The maximum upper age limit including all relaxations shall not exceed 56 years. The relaxation in age for SC/ST/OBC (NCL) is subject to availability of vacancy for the particular category. | Additional relaxations: Ex-Servicemen and children/family members of those who died in the 1984 riots will get relaxation as per Government of India directives.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (10-06-2026). Qualifications must be from Universities or Institutes recognized/accredited by UGC/AICTE/NCVT/NCVET/SCTE&VT set up by Central/State Government. Only full-time qualifications will be considered. ITI/Diploma/B.Sc. in the specific branch/subjects as mentioned against respective posts will be considered as eligible qualifications; ITI/Diploma/B.Sc. in other branches will not be considered. No claim of possession of equivalent qualifications will be entertained. | Educational Qualification (Post-wise) | Operator (HEMM) Gr. III | 10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) of 2 years duration in Mechanic Motor Vehicle (MMV) trade OR 1 year duration in Diesel Mechanic Trade Apprenticeship Certificate in MMV or Diesel Mechanic Trade required Valid Heavy Vehicle Driving Licence mandatory First Aid Training Certificate desirable | Mining Mate Gr. III | 10th Pass Valid Mining Mate Certificate of Competency (Restricted to Opencast Metalliferous Mines) issued by DGMS First Aid Certificate preferable | Jr. Foreman (Mines) | Diploma in Mining / Mining Engineering Valid Mining Foreman Certificate of Competency (Restricted to Opencast Metalliferous Mines) issued by DGMS | Jr. Foreman (Electrical) | Full-time Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institution Valid Supervisory Certificate of Competency (M.V/H.T/E.H.T) issued by the Electrical Licensing Board, Odisha covering Mining installations | SUPT (JOT)-Operator & Operator Gr. III | 10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Electronics Mechanic / Technician Mechatronics / Electrician / Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic / Fitter Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required | SUPT (JOT)-Fitter & Technician (Fitter) Gr. III | 10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Fitter Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required | SUPT (JOT)-Electrical & Technician (Electrical) Gr. III | 10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Electrician Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required | SUPT (JOT)-Laboratory | B.Sc. (Hons) in Chemistry | SUPT (JOT)-Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic & Technician (Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic) Gr. III | 10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required | ** If the Supervisory Certificate of Competency (M.V/H.T/E.H.T) is granted by any other Electrical Licensing Board, the candidate must get it endorsed for validity from the Electrical Licensing Board of Odisha as per the Electrical Licensing Board Regulation, Odisha, 2014, failing which his service will not be confirmed.

salary_details.medical facility during training: Indoor and Outdoor at NALCO Hospital
salary_details.on placement (t0 grade): Rs. 29,500 – 3% – 70,000/- with all regular employee emoluments
salary_details.other benefits on placement: Transport Allowance, HRA / Housing, Site Location Allowance, Leave Travel Allowance, Medical Facility (CHSS), Educational facilities, PF, Gratuity, Group Insurance, Pension (NALCO Defined Contribution Pension Scheme 2025), Performance Linked Incentive Scheme, etc.

selection_process: Type Objective type - 100 Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs), 1 mark each
Question Paper Composition 60% Technical (domain specific) questions + 40% Non-technical questions (Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, General Knowledge and English)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official NALCO website https://www.nalcoindia.com. Applications received through any other mode will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected. The online application is a 2-step process -

Step-II: Login with credentials, fill application form, upload documents, and make online payment of fee (if applicable). Candidates must carefully furnish all correct details as no change/edit will be allowed after submission. A candidate is allowed to apply for only one post; if multiple applications are submitted for a single post, the latest application will be considered and the rest rejected. If a candidate applies for multiple posts, the candidature will be summarily rejected. Before applying online, candidates must scan and keep ready: passport-size photograph (4.5 cm × 3.5 cm, 20–50 KB), signature (blue/black ink, 10–20 KB), left thumb impression, hand-written declaration, and all relevant certificates.
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
important_instructions: A candidate is allowed to apply for only one post - applications for multiple posts will result in summary rejection of all applications. Only full-time qualifications from recognized institutes will be considered; ITI/Diploma/B.Sc. must be in the specific branch/trade prescribed for the post. All qualifications and experience must have been acquired on or before the closing date of application (10-06-2026). OBC (NCL) certificate must be issued on or after 01-04-2026 (Central List OBC only - State Government OBC lists are not followed). EWS Income & Asset Certificate must be issued on or after 01-04-2026 based on FY 2025-26 income. PwBD candidates must possess a Disability Certificate certifying minimum 40% disability issued as per the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017. Only permanent (non-temporary) disabilities are eligible for reservation and age relaxation. Land Ousted candidates whose lands have been acquired for the NALCO project at Damanjodi must upload a valid Employment Preference Certificate - maximum age is 40 years as on 10-06-2026. Employees of PSUs/Government organizations must apply through proper channel and produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of document verification. Candidates working in PSUs/Government organizations who fail to produce NOC will not be considered for appointment; their application will be subject to submission of original release order. Application fee once paid shall neither be refunded under any circumstances nor held in reserve for any other recruitment or selection. No documents/certificates and application forms are required to be sent by post. Signature / hand written declaration in CAPITAL LETTERS will NOT be accepted. Electronic gadgets including mobile phones, smartwatches, etc. are not permitted inside the CBT examination hall - carrying them may lead to criminal prosecution. Canvassing in any form during any stage of recruitment will render the candidate ineligible. Any dispute with regard to this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Cuttack (Odisha) only. NALCO does not seek payment of any kind other than the above-mentioned application fee - candidates are cautioned against fraud.
